title: MeowConsole
description: MeowConsole is a server-side enhancement mod built for Fabric 26.1 + Java 25.  It brings a Paper-like experience to Fabric servers: a better console, practical anti-xray, and strong performance under real gameplay load.
body:
# 🐱 MeowConsole Mod Introduction

`MeowConsole` is a **server enhancement mod for Fabric and NeoForge** built for server owners who want better administration tools, stronger anti-xray protection, and smoother quality-of-life features for multiplayer gameplay.

It focuses on the parts that matter most on a real server:

- ✨ Better console and admin usability
- ⛏️ Practical Anti-Xray protection
- 🌙 Smoother multiplayer sleep acceleration
- 🧩 Clearer operational status and debugging tools

If you want a mod that improves both the operator experience and the player experience, `MeowConsole` is designed for exactly that.

If you like this mod, please consider following the project on Modrinth.

If you want to support continued development, you can also donate:

- ❤️ Afdian: <https://afdian.com/a/xiaoyiluck>
- 💙 PayPal: <https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/neworldcn>

Thank you for the support.

---

## 📦 Modrinth Downloads

- MeowConsole project page: <https://modrinth.com/mod/meowconsole>
- MeowConsole versions page: <https://modrinth.com/mod/meowconsole/versions?l=fabric>
- MeowConsole NeoForge versions page: <https://modrinth.com/mod/meowconsole/versions?l=neoforge>
- Fabric API project page: <https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api>
- Fabric API versions page: <https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/versions?l=fabric>

---

## 🌟 Core Highlights

### ⛏️ Anti-Xray Protection

- Obfuscates ore-related data before chunks are sent to players
- Supports per-dimension configuration
- Continues to adopt and adapt selected Paper anti-xray optimization ideas
- Improves reveal behavior in complex cave systems to reduce awkward fake ore leftovers
- Includes status, reload, and debug-oriented admin support for daily operations

### 🖥️ Better Console and Admin Experience

- A more Paper-like server management feel
- Improved console usability with better quality-of-life behavior
- Anti-xray management commands can be used through server commands and RCON
- Easier to verify whether features are enabled and how config is currently applied

### 🌙 Multiplayer Sleep Fast-Forward

- Supports a more CMI-like timelapse feel for sleeping nights
- Nights can fast-forward visibly instead of only ending in an abrupt instant skip
- Supports `title` and `bossbar` display modes
- Supports both player-count and percentage-based acceleration thresholds
- Includes 26.1 time-sync handling so non-sleeping players can also see the world moving forward

### 🤖 Ignore Carpet Fake Players

- Sleep acceleration can ignore fake players added by `fabric-carpet`
- When enabled, only real online players are counted
- Great for servers that use bots, afk helpers, or test fake players

### 🔧 Better Visibility for Server Owners

- Helpful status commands, config source information, and active summaries
- Easier debugging when validating server-side behavior
- Designed to improve operations without adding unnecessary runtime burden

---

## 🆕 What Matters in v1.2.3

- 🆙 Added compatibility for Minecraft `26.1.2` while keeping support for `26.1` and `26.1.1`
- 🧩 Added official support for `NeoForge 26.1.x`
- 🧩 Added `MCDReforged` compatibility mode for console-output parsing environments
- 💾 Helps `PrimeBackup` and similar tools keep working by preserving vanilla-style save and player-log signals
- 🖥️ Keeps MeowConsole's Paper-like terminal improvements without forcing the same behavior onto MCDR-managed stdout
- 🛠️ Included additional cleanup around compatibility handling and IDE warning noise

---

## 🧩 Dependencies

### Required

- For Fabric: `fabric-api`
- For NeoForge: no extra API dependency required

### Optional

- `fabricproxy-lite`
  - Only needed if you enable Velocity bridge features

---

## ✅ Compatibility

- Declared compatibility range: `minecraft >=26.1 <=26.1.2`
- NeoForge: `26.1.x`
- Fabric Loader: `>=0.18.4`
- Java: `>=25`

Recommended combinations:

- Fabric / Minecraft `26.1`: Loader `0.18.4+`, Fabric API `0.144.0+26.1` or newer compatible
- Fabric / Minecraft `26.1.1`: Loader `0.18.6+`, Fabric API `0.145.2+26.1.1` or newer compatible
- Fabric / Minecraft `26.1.2`: Loader `0.19.1+`, Fabric API `0.145.4+26.1.2` or newer compatible
- NeoForge / Minecraft `26.1.x`: NeoForge `26.1.x` build, Java `25+`

---

## 🧪 Usage Notes

- `sleep acceleration`
- `player messages`
- `flightguard`

These features are currently still considered test features. It is recommended to validate them on a test server before enabling them in production.

If you are upgrading from an older version, check the `v1.2.3` release notes, especially the note for `MCDReforged` users about the new compatibility config.

---

## 🔗 Repository & Support

- GitHub: <https://github.com/xiaoyiluck666/meowconsole>
- Issues: <https://github.com/xiaoyiluck666/meowconsole/issues>
